title: About visa excuse exams.
content:
About visa excuse exams.

2024-2025 Academic Year Spring Term Midterm Exams;

They are expected to upload to the Student Petition System

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

by Wednesday, April 23, 2025 at 17:00.

You can log in to the system with your e-mail address and password of the student whose ALMS/STIX you used.

Make-up Exams will be held between 5-11 May 2025, on the day and time when the detailed instructor will be determined, the details are available via STIX etc. announcements of the detailed instructor.

Successes of your exams.
